body:
Roughly based on code from @sandreza and @glwagner.

Still needs
- [ ] a higher-level `neki` function?
- [ ] make it work for priors with means
- [ ] some tests: do you have a simple example we can try this on?
- [ ] `eki`: what is the difference between this and neki?
title: rename to Solus.jl, add NEKI
